columnDescriptions: Methodology of Qualitative Columns in the Voluntary Registry Offset Database (VROD)
Column Name | Data Source
Project ID | "ACR", "ART", "CAR", "GS", VCS" concatenated with the project ID number from the registry Projects tables
Project Name | Registry Projects tables
Voluntary Registry | The registry the project is listed under
ARB / WA Project | Indicates if project is listed in the ARB or WA Issuance & Retirement files
Voluntary Status | Registry Projects tables
Scope | Mapped from types; see our Scopes & Types document for mapping of types to scope
Type | BCTP classifies every project by type; see our Scopes & Types document for a description of each type | .
Reduction / Removal | Each project type is classified as reductions, impermanent removals, long-duration removals, or mixed
Methodology / Protocol | We harmonize the methodologies according to their official name by the registry**
Methodology Version | Methodology column, when the version is present
Region | Mapped using the United Nations Geoscheme
Country | Registry Project tables with harmonized country name spellings; projects covering more than one country and international waters are included as "international"**
State | Registry Projects tables
Project Site Location | Registry Projects tables
Project Developer | Registry project tables; any changes between versions are noted in 'BCTP notes' column*
Project Owner | Registry project tables; any changes between versions are noted in 'BCTP notes' column*
Offset Project Operator | Registry Projects tables*
Authorized Project Designee | Registry Projects tables*
Verifier | Registry Projects tables*
Estimated Annual Emission Reductions | Registry Projects tables
ARB ID | Registry project tables, and if blank from ARB Issuance & Retirement table
ARB Project Type | ARB Issuance & Retirement table

ARB Project Status | 'Compliance Program Status (ARB or Ecology)' column of ACR Projects table, for projects with an ARB methodology; 'ARB Project Status' column of CAR Projects table; 'Status' column of VCS-ARB Projects table
WA ID | Registry project tables for projects with a WA methodology or from WA Issuance & Retirement table.
WA Project Type | WA Issuance & Retirement table
WA Project Status | 'Compliance Program Status (ARB or Ecology)' column of ACR Projects table, for projects with a WA methodology.
ARB / WA Status | ARB Project Status or WA Project Status***
ARB / WA ID | ARB ID or WA ID***
transactionTypes: Method for Tallying of Transaction Data Columns in the Voluntary Registry Offset Database (VROD)
Equations for constructing Projects tab:
- Issuances = sum all when Transaction type = Issuance, by vintage year and by issuance year
- Retirements/cancellations = sum of all Transaction type = Retirement/Cancellation (including ARB and WA)
- Buffer pool deposits = sum of all Transaction type = Buffer Contribution
- Reversals not covered by the buffer pool =  sum of all Transaction type = Intentional reversal
- Reversals covered by the buffer pool =  sum of all Transaction type = Buffer Pool Subtraction >> Unintentional reversal
- Credit remaining = for each vintage: total Issuances minus total retirements
- First year of project = first vintage year that there is an issuance
- PERs = Sum of all PER transaction type
Note: The '+/-' column specifies whether each transaction sub-type is treated as positive or negative when summed
Methodology and Source of Data for Transaction Types
Registry | Transaction type | Transaction sub-type | Project ID | +/- | Quantity | Transaction Date | Data Table Name
ACR | Issuance | Issuance | Project ID | + | [Credits issued to project] | [Date issued (GMT)] | ACR Issuances

ACR | Issuance | Transfer to ARB | Project ID | - | [Quantity of Credits] for ARB projects (projects listed in ARB Issuances and Retirements) for credits not held in the buffer pool (when the ‘Account Holder’ does not equal “ACR”) and when Cancellation Type = "Convert to ARB Offset Credits" | [Status effective (GMT)] | ACR Cancellations

ACR | Issuance | Cancelled during transfer to ARB | Project ID | - | [Quantity of Credits] for ARB projects (projects listed in ARB Issuances and Retirements) for credits not held in the buffer pool (when the ‘Account Holder’ does not equal “ACR”) and when Cancellation Type = "Removal of credits from the registry" | [Status effective (GMT)] | ACR Cancellations

ACR | Issuance | Transfer to WA | Project ID | - | [Quantity of Credits] for WA projects (projects listed in WA Issuances and Retirements) when the cancellation type is 'Convert to Ecology offset credits'. | [Status effective (GMT)] | ACR Cancellations

ACR | Issuance | Cancelled during transfer to WA | Project ID | - | [Quantity of Credits] for WA projects (projects listed in WA Issuances and Retirements) for credits not held in the buffer pool (when the ‘Account Holder’ does not equal “ACR”) and when Cancellation Type = "Removal of credits from the registry" | [Status effective (GMT)] | ACR Cancellations
ACR | Buffer Contribution | Buffer Contribution | Project ID | + | [Credits Issued to Buffer Pool]+[Credits transferred to the buffer pool] | [Date issued (GMT)] | ACR Issuances

ACR | Buffer Contribution | Buffer pool transfer to ARB | Project ID | - | [Quantity of Credits] for ARB projects (projects listed in ARB Issuances and Retirements) for buffer pool credits (when the ‘Account Holder’ column equals “ACR”) when Cancellation Type = "Convert to ARB Offset Credits" | [Status effective (GMT)] | ACR Cancellations

ACR | Buffer Contribution | Cancelled during transfer to ARB | Project ID | - | [Quantity of Credits] for ARB projects (projects listed in ARB Issuances and Retirements) for buffer pool credits (when the ‘Account Holder’ column equals “ACR”) when Cancellation Type = "Removal of credits from the registry" | [Status effective (GMT)] | ACR Cancellations

ACR | Buffer Contribution | Buffer pool transfer to WA | Project ID | - | [Quantity of Credits] for WA projects (projects listed in WA Issuances and Retirements) for buffer pool credits (when the ‘Account Holder’ column equals “ACR”) when Cancellation Type = "Convert to Ecology Offset Credits" | [Status effective (GMT)] | ACR Cancellations

ACR | Buffer Contribution | Cancelled during transfer to WA | Project ID | - | [Quantity of Credits] for WA projects (projects listed in WA Issuances and Retirements) for buffer pool credits (when the ‘Account Holder’ column equals “ACR”) when Cancellation Type = "Removal of credits from the registry" | [Status effective (GMT)] | ACR Cancellations

ACR | Buffer Subtraction | Buffer Subtraction | Project ID | + | For non-ARB non-Ecology projects, that are from the buffer pool account (when the ‘Account Holder’ column equals “ACR”) and Cancellation Reason <> "Compensation for Intentional Reversal": 
if [Quantity of Credits] <= (total buffer contributions minus total buffer subtractions) 
then [Quantity of Credits], else 0.
otherwise if  [Quantity of Credits] > total credits issued minus total credits retired/cancelled then the remainder is a buffer subtraction, then [Quantity of Credits] - (total credit issued - total retired/cancelled) else 0 | [Status effective (GMT)] | ACR Cancellations

ACR | Buffer Subtraction | Buffer Subtraction | Project ID | + | [Quantity of credits] when the ‘Cancellation Type’ equals “Compensation for Intentional Reversal” for buffer pool credits (when the ‘Account Holder’ column = “ACR”) | [Status effective (GMT)] | ACR Cancellations

ACR | Buffer Subtraction | Buffer Subtraction | Project ID | + | [Quantity of Credits] for ARB or WA projects for buffer pool credits (when the ‘Account Holder’ column = “ACR”) for cancellation types we haven't already captured: Cancellation type = “Compensation for Early Project Termination" | [Status effective (GMT)] | ACR Cancellations
ACR | Buffer Subtraction | Unintentional reversal | Project ID | + | We have not identified transactions to date
ACR | Retirement/Cancellation | Retirement | Project ID | + | [Quantity of Credits] | [Status effective (GMT)] | ACR Retirements

ACR | Retirement/Cancellation | Cancellation | Project ID | + | [Quantity of Credits] non-ARB non-Ecology projects, that are not in the buffer pool (when ‘Account Holder’ column does not equal “ACR”) and when 'Cancelation Type' <> "Compensation for Intentional Reversal" (All cancellations not involved in the transition of credits from ACR to ARB or Ecology (since these are accounted for as adjustments to issuances) and not in the buffer pool) | [Status effective (GMT)] | ACR Cancellations

ACR | Retirement/Cancellation | Cancellation | Project ID | + | For non-ARB non-Ecology projects, that are from the buffer pool account (when the ‘Account Holder’ column equals “ACR”) and Cancellation Reason <> "Compensation for Intentional Reversal'
If [Quantity of Credits] > (total buffer contributions minus total buffer subtractions) 
then [Quantity of Credits] for the portion of ‘Quantity of Credits’ that <= total issuances minus total retirements/cancellations | [Status effective (GMT)] | ACR Cancellations
